## Verification

- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm run test` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds locally
- [ ] Tested in a browser (mention which)
- [ ] Tested keyboard navigation / screen reader where UI changed
- [ ] No new ESLint warnings introduced
